Users deposit G$ as collateral and mint         synthetic stock tokens at a minimum 150% collateral ratio.         Fee model: 0.3% of the USD value of each mint/burn is charged in G$         and forwarded to the UBI fee splitter (33% \u2192 UBI pool).         Liquidation: anyone can liquidate a position whose collateral ratio         falls below LIQUIDATION_RATIO (120%). The liquidator provides the         synthetic tokens, receives the G$ collateral at a 10% discount,         and the remaining collateral is forwarded to the fee splitter.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/stocks/CollateralVault.sol":"IGoodDollarToken"},"evmVersion":"prague","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":false,"runs":200},"remappings":[":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/"]},"sources":{"src/stocks/CollateralVault.sol":{"keccak256":"0xb9ea7817d8f8ba5bfb3dc0fac7c8e24a739644715fff61bf4ec3c2ce193dfc65","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://7ac3b6d6d4afdcdc6ac3a5e04227f48e72aaa6c6d7f6857fbabe3ec66c277f56","dweb:/ipfs/QmZUdpfgMLsYo6Qsp4eEfY6gyZ4bc1BEZiz9SivRsrM45J"]},"src/stocks/PriceOracle.sol":{"keccak256":"0xe22526d55c9634ddad2da46a70e51519e74927a154cd650c069a1989b7026d8b","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://0c3d478ea782e5e922247beb0211d10f0377e31a537136af7f52da2f84c1c06d","dweb:/ipfs/QmW4bxaTgb2XSNYxK3D43xjgbKZ3As534Zz55sBqSQZinn"]},"src/stocks/SyntheticAsset.sol":{"keccak256":"0xdc425a93805abe0eeb56073ffa471214baf2be5a971fad7e9472242ecd63855d","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://09e8ad2d4158162627368621b24f477bfe6bf36f981dcd7480bca5f9d46f80e6","dweb:/ipfs/QmNkVkshSf9wVU5hh1JTtBgV5AZjgKy8waZcXthSirSec3"]}},"version":1}
